description: Register an IO manager that stores assets as Parquet files on Google Cloud Storage

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

bucket.label: Bucket
bucket.description: GCS bucket to store Parquet files in

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: GCS object prefix for asset files, e.g. 'dagster/assets'

project.label: Project
project.description: GCP project ID (uses default project if not set)

gcp_credentials_env_var.label: GCP Credentials Env Var
gcp_credentials_env_var.description: Environment variable holding a JSON service account key (uses ADC if not set)

name: GCS Parquet IO Manager
